pages.text:
ENVIRONMENTAL PRODUCT DECLARATION
    IN ACCORDANCE WITH EN 15804+A2 & ISO 14025
    EPD HUB, HUB-5943
    Published on 09.04.2026, last updated on 09.04.2026, valid until 08.04.2031

    N50/20 Xencrete
    Entire Concrete










This EPD is intended for business-to-business and/or business-to-consumer communication. Life Cycle Assessment study has been performed in accordance with the
requirements of EN 15804, EPD Hub PCR version 1.2 (24 Mar 2025) and JRC characterization factors EF 3.1. The manufacturer has the sole ownership, liability, and responsibility
for the EPD. EPDs within the same product category but from different programs may not be comparable. EPDs of construction products may not be comparable if they do not
comply with EN 15804 and if they are not compared in a building context.
One Peay
 ClickLCA Created with One Click LCA 1 N50/20 Xencrete

comply with EN 15804 and if they are not compared in a building context.

  WHO WE ARE                                                  OUR COMMITMENT TO THE ENVIRONMENT

  As the region's leading independent supplier of             Entire Concrete is committed to implementing best
  concrete Entire Concrete offers fast, quality assured       practice environmental measures. At its inception,
  ready-mix concrete for projects of all sizes throughout     Entire Concrete began with the focus on local people,
  Newcastle, Singleton and the Hunter Valley. Beginning       products and community's needs.
  in 2008, Entire Concrete has rapidly grown to become
  the leading independent supplier of quality premixed        We believe it is a requirement that we actively
  concrete products in the Greater Hunter region.             contribute to the local community, and as such, Entire
                                                              Concrete, the home of the green trucks, decided to go
  At Entire Concrete, we pride ourselves on offering          green in 2010.
  specialised concrete solutions tailored to your needs.
  From residential to commercial and industrial-scale         Our strategy included;
  projects, Entire Concrete has developed a reputation       •     Moving toward long term sustainability with a
  for quality, safety and efficiency when it comes to our          view to become increasingly self-sufficient
  products and our service. With a modern agitator fleet,          over time.
  housing 37 trucks, from 10-wheeled concrete trucks to      •     Installation of a concrete recycler. Installing a
  smaller mini trucks, Entire Concrete is capable of               concrete recycler reduces waste, eliminates
  servicing projects of all sizes.                                 the need for excess landfill and potential soil
                                                                   contaminants.
                                                             •     Recycle the raw materials utilised in the
                                                                   manufacturing of concrete, including
                                                                   aggregates (rocks) sands, and cementitious
                                                                   materials (i.e. cement powder and flash).
                                                             •     Reducing Entire Concrete's reliance on our
                                                                   natural environment by harvesting the
                                                                   rainwater that falls on site. Entire currently
                                                                   harvests approximately 450,000 litres of
                                                                   water.
                                                             •     Installing a solar electricity system through
                                                                   Metro Solar, an Australian-based engineering
                                                                   firm who offered the new and innovative
                                                                   microinverter technology.
  Our experienced batching team works directly with
  customers to get projects completed, often exceeding        Today, the power generated through the use of solar
  customer expectations by providing a superior result        technology is sufficient to power the company's on-site
  from project start through to completion.                   concrete recycler and water reticulation programs,
                                                              another step in the road towards onsite self-
  As a part of our continued growth within the ready-mix      sufficiency.
  sector, Entire Concrete has two industry leading
  concrete plants in Cameron Park and Singleton. From         More recently we have begun incorporating the CEMI
  these plants, we deliver our quality product throughout     additive to our Xencrete range of lower carbon
  Newcastle and the Hunter Valley.                            concretes to enable a greater use of flyash in our
                                                              concrete, continuing to lead the way in sustainability
                                                              and technical excellence.

CORE ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT INDICATORS - EN 15804+A2, EF 3.1

1) GWP = Global Warming Potential. 2) EP = Eutrophication potential. Required characterisation method and data are in kg P-eq. Multiply by 3,07 to get PO4e. 3) POCP = Photochemical ozone formation. 4) ADP = Abiotic depletion potential.

5) EN 15804+A2 disclaimer for Abiotic depletion and Water use and optional indicators except Particulate matter and Ionizing radiation, human health. The results of these environmental impact indicators shall be used with care as the
uncertainties on these results are high or as there is limited experience with the indicator.

THIRD-PARTY VERIFICATION STATEMENT

EPD Hub declares that this EPD is verified in accordance with ISO 14025 by an independent. third-party verifier. The
project report on the Life Cycle Assessment and the report(s) on features of environmental relevance are filed at EPD
Hub. EPD Hub PCR and ECO Platform verification checklist are used.

EPD Hub is not able to identify any unjustified deviations from the PCR and EN 15804+A2 in the Environmental Product
Declaration and its project report.

EPD Hub maintains its independence as a third-party body; it was not involved in the execution of the LCA or in the
development of the declaration and has no conflicts of interest regarding this verification.

The company-specific data and upstream and downstream data have been examined as regards plausibility and
consistency. The publisher is responsible for ensuring the factual integrity and legal compliance of this declaration.
